title: Birwadi Fort
tagline: Birwadi Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Birwadi fort (Marathi: बिरवाडी किल्ला) is hill fortress located in the village of Birwadi in Roha taluka, Raigad district, Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Birwadi fort (Marathi: बिरवाडी किल्ला) is hill fortress located in the village of Birwadi in Roha taluka, Raigad district, Maharashtra, India. Birwadi village is about 3 km away from Chanera village, which is on the Roha–Salav road. The fort looks like a small hillock from a distance.

topPlaces.name: Roha Ashtami
topPlaces.description: Roha Ashtami is a twin city and a municipal council in the Raigad district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

topPlaces.name: Roha
topPlaces.description: Roha (Marathi: रोहा) is a town and the headquarters of Roha taluka in the Raigad district of Maharashtra, India. It is located 120km south-east of Mumbai, in the Konkan region of western India.

topPlaces.name: Avchitgad
topPlaces.description: Avchitgad is a fort located in the Sahyadri ranges of Maharashtra. The fort is situated near Roha in the Raigad district.

items.note: Roha Ashtami is a twin city and a municipal council in the Raigad district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.
Roha (Marathi: रोहा) is a town and the headquarters of Roha taluka in the Raigad district of Maharashtra, India. It is located 120km south-east of Mumbai, in the Konkan region of western India.
Avchitgad is a fort located in the Sahyadri ranges of Maharashtra. The fort is situated near Roha in the Raigad district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Birwadi Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Birwadi Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Birwadi Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (76 km) and the nearest railway station is Mumbai CSMT (61 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Birwadi Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Birwadi Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Birwadi Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Birwadi Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Birwadi Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Roha Ashtami, Roha, Avchitgad.
